value: Business Counsel
One focused session. One real problem.
$350 per session.
Business Counsel is for moments when something is keeping you up at night.
What happens in the session: you explain the situation, we identify the real issue, we lay out your options clearly, we pressure-test the risks, and you leave knowing what to do next.
No ongoing commitment. No long contract. No vague advice. Just clarity.
Sessions are limited each month to ensure focus and depth.
You are questioning your pricing and need a grounded outside read
You are considering a collaboration, partnership, or influencer deal and want to structure it properly
You are thinking about firing a client, hiring someone new, or making a structural shift
You are deciding whether to finally launch the idea you have been building on nights and weekends
You are stuck between two real options and need to choose
Apply for Business Counsel

value: Strategic Partnership
For big moves that need serious alignment.
This is deeper work.
If you are preparing for a launch, growth phase, repositioning, or major shift, we can work together in a defined engagement.
How it works: clear scope, defined timeline, focused objectives, and limited engagements.
This is not an open-ended retainer. It is structured work designed to move something forward.
If you are serious about leveling up your marketing, apply below.
Leading a rebrand of a core product or service that has outgrown its original look and message
Project managing a website rebuild so it reflects the business you have actually become
Designing a practical social media strategy for a small but serious team
Reviewing your product or service mix to decide what to cut, keep, or prioritize
Building a clear go-to-market plan for a new offering
